## Import

```ts
import { RStack } from "@ripple-design/rui"
```

## Props

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gap` | `CSSProperties["gap"]` | no | Sets the gap between direct children. |
| `align` | `CSSProperties["alignItems"]` | no | Controls how direct children align on the cross axis. |
| `justify` | `CSSProperties["justifyContent"]` | no | Controls how direct children are distributed on the main axis. |
| `wrap` | `CSSProperties["flexWrap"] \| boolean` | no | Controls whether direct children can wrap; `true` maps to `wrap`. |
| `inline` | `boolean` | no | Switches the container display from `flex` to `inline-flex`. |
| `direction` | `CSSProperties["flexDirection"]` | no | Controls the main axis direction for direct children. |

Generated from `packages/rui/src/components/stack/types.ts`.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:END -->
